name: Bus Station 4 LLC
recent_news: No M&A or operational news located; the address (138 S Ridgewood Ave, Daytona Beach) is the public-facing Greyhound/Trailways/Flix intercity bus terminal, suggesting this LLC may be tied to that depot rather than a school-bus contractor. Volusia County Schools runs its own in-house student transportation.
fit_notes: Likely not a school-bus contractor. Address ties to the intercity bus terminal and Volusia County Schools self-operates student transport. Low-priority/likely-not-a-target until classification is confirmed.

name: SJP School Trnsprtn Speclsts
recent_news: No M&A news located. Single-member LLC registered to Stephen J. Painter at his residence (123 Jefferson Ave, St James, NY 11780); appears to be a small Long Island (Suffolk County) owner-operated school-transport business.
fit_notes: Micro-scale Suffolk County operator run from owner's home; could be a small tuck-in if it holds district route contracts, but very small. Worth a direct call to confirm fleet, district contracts, and owner's age/succession interest.

name: F & M Bus Van Corp
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Small NYC-area van/bus operator at 14109 Springfield Blvd, Queens (Springfield Gardens, 11413); not visible on current NYC DOE OPT bus-contractor lists, but Queens has many micro Pre-K/SPED van vendors.
fit_notes: Likely a small NYC OPT Pre-K/SPED van subcontractor. NYC consent-decree wage rules and short-route mix make these targets tricky for Summit; only attractive if it holds yellow-bus contracts or scales into SPED.

name: A1 School Bus
recent_news: No M&A news located. Operating at 7248 Woodland Ave, Philadelphia (19142) since ~2005; small owner-operated school-bus service. Note: a separate 'A-1 School Bus LLC' (USDOT 2203931) exists at 7024 City Ave - appears to be a different/affiliated entity.
fit_notes: Small Philly minority-owned school-bus subcontractor; SDP's contractor base is highly fragmented and chronically short of capacity, making small tuck-ins relevant. Confirm fleet count, SDP route slots, and any affiliation with the A-1 LLC at City Ave before pursuing.

name: Dependability Co
recent_news: NLRB unfair-labor-practice charge (Case 04-CA-119117) filed Dec 2013 by Local 726 IUJAT alleging 8(a)(3) discharge; dismissed Feb 2014. No M&A news located. Operates as Dependability Bus Co LLC at 1300 Adams Ave, Philadelphia 19124.
fit_notes: Small owner-led Philly school-bus subcontractor with at least one prior union dispute; potentially attractive as a SDP route-capacity tuck-in given platform's Philadelphia footprint. Confirm fleet, contract slots, and owner's age/exit posture; prior union activity is a diligence flag.
